detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract Binbogami (Binbogami.sol#345-1150) has payable functions:
	 - Binbogami.receive() (Binbogami.sol#937)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [Binbogami](Binbogami.sol#L345-L1150) has payable functions:
	 - [Binbogami.receive()](Binbogami.sol#L937)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Binbogami._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Binbogami.sol#677-793):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Binbogami.sol#741)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Binbogami.sol#807-819)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Binbogami.sol#791)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Binbogami.sol#921)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Binbogami.sol#901)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Binbogami.sol#903)
	Binbogami._rOwned (Binbogami.sol#361) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Binbogami._takeTeam(uint256) (Binbogami.sol#915-923)
	- Binbogami._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Binbogami.sol#875-911)
	- Binbogami.balanceOf(address) (Binbogami.sol#503-507)
	- Binbogami.constructor() (Binbogami.sol#441-467)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Binbogami.sol#791)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Binbogami.sol#929)
	Binbogami._rTotal (Binbogami.sol#373) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Binbogami._getCurrentSupply() (Binbogami.sol#1071-1081)
	- Binbogami._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Binbogami.sol#927-933)
	- Binbogami.constructor() (Binbogami.sol#441-467)
	- Binbogami.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Binbogami.sol#599-621)
